title: Division by zero causes revert in FSushiAirdropsVotingEscrow.claim()
reason: Merged as F-010 with narrowed root cause and impact: the issue is specifically unguarded zero `totalSupply` during per-week payout calculation.

title: Inverted Bankrupt check allows unlimited deposits
reason: Rejected. Allowing deposits when `totalSupply == 0` is the necessary initialization path for the vault, not an exploitable invariant break.

title: Unchecked arithmetic in FarmingLPToken._transfer allows theft of shares
reason: Rejected as stated. Ordinary rounding in `shares = amount * sharesOf(from) / balance` is not the reportable bug; the real exploitable issue is the duplicated reward correction captured separately in F-003.

title: Missing zero address validation in FSushiAirdrops.claim()
reason: Rejected. `FSushi.mint()` ultimately uses OpenZeppelin ERC20 `_mint`, which already reverts on `address(0)`, so this is not a silent burn path.

title: Unsafe int128 to uint256 cast in FSushiAirdropsVotingEscrow._votingEscrowBalanceOf
reason: Rejected as a separate finding. The realistic failure mode is the use of the latest checkpoint for historical timestamps, which is already captured in F-009.

title: Unchecked arithmetic in FSushiBar checkpoint can overflow
reason: Rejected. Solidity 0.8 checked arithmetic makes these additions revert on overflow; no practical overflow exploit is present.

title: Fee-on-transfer token vulnerability in FarmingLPToken
reason: Rejected. The underlying asset is a UniswapV2 LP token selected from MasterChef, not an arbitrary fee-on-transfer token.

title: Lack of access control on FlashStrategySushiSwapFactory.createFlashStrategySushiSwap
reason: Rejected. Public creation is consistent with deterministic-per-pid factory deployment and does not let an attacker choose malicious implementation, parameters, or ownership.

title: EmergencyWithdraw silently discards unclaimed yield
reason: Rejected. This is an explicit emergency-only escape hatch (`EMERGENCY ONLY`) rather than an unintended protocol vulnerability.

title: Right shift produces zero rewards after 256 weeks in FSushiAirdropsVotingEscrow
reason: Rejected. This is an emission-schedule design choice from repeated right-shifting, not a security vulnerability by itself.

title: Precision loss in FarmingLPToken.withdraw can lock user funds
reason: Rejected. Standard pro-rata integer rounding may leave dust but does not by itself create a realistic fund-lock or theft issue at protocol level.
